---
title: "Sir Thomas Fairbairn, 2nd Bt."
---

## Sir Thomas Fairbairn, 2nd Bt.

**Dates:** (1823-1891)

### Description

art collector and patron

### Biography

He married (1848) Allison Callaway (d. 1907); he lived at Brambridge House, Hants by 1866. [ODNB; Dod 1876; PB 1952]

### Letters

- Letter from May 1st 1876
- Letter from March 20th 1876
- Letter from March 7th 1876 [6 March 1876]
- Letter from Febry 1st 1875
- Letter from Jany 27th 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
